title: UG Academic Council (UGAC) - IIT Mandi
subtitle: Information, processes, and resources for undergraduates

sections.title: Overview
sections.body: The Undergraduate Academic Council (UGAC) supports academic policy, student support processes, and communication related to undergraduate academics. This website centralizes key processes, curated resources, and clear step-by-step guides so students can move faster with fewer emails and fewer surprises.

sections.title: Guiding Principles
sections.body: Clarity first. Official where needed. Student-friendly always. We aim to keep information consistent, accessible, and up-to-date, with clear owners for each page so updates don’t get lost.

sections.title: Proposed Website Structure
sections.body: Suggested sections: Overview, Guiding Principles, Legacy & History, B.Tech Curriculum, Team, Academic Opportunities, Procedural Flowcharts, Announcements, and Contacts.

sections.title: Legacy and History: Previous Academic Secretaries

sections.title: Academic Opportunities
sections.body: Explore common academic pathways: minors/honors, research projects, exchange programs, special topic courses, and internships aligned with academics. (Demo list below — link to official pages where possible.)
